name: BUFFALO WILD WINGS GRILL AND BAR

violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed buns on the floor by the walk in freezer.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Observed wash cloth in the bar area and in the kitchen that was not storage in sanitizing solution.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. On the ice machine the sealant around the window is not smooth at time of inspection.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Observed single use portion cups stored on the floor at the time of inspection.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Observed single use baby changing station liners under the tub of water on the shelf.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. Fan guards in WIC need cleaned of Dirt Debris.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor in cooking area needs cleaned of spilled chicken and dirt debris.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
